name: main-banner
title: Restore & Return to Your Natural Rhythm
subtitle: Herbal guidance, nervous system restoration, and embodied wellbeing with Matthew Gabriel.
description: Supporting people in slowing down, restoring vitality, and reconnecting with the wisdom of the body through plant allies, nourishment, ritual, and simple daily practices.

name: about
title: About Matthew Gabriel
description: I am an initiated Sangoma, nutritional practitioner, cacao guide, and founder of {{veeraBlends}}.
description2: My work explores the relationship between nervous system health, nourishment, embodiment, herbal wisdom, and sustainable wellbeing.
description3: For many years I have worked closely with plant medicines and restorative wellness practices, learning how simple daily rituals can support deeper vitality, emotional balance, groundedness, and connection to life.
description4: What I offer is less about quick fixes or intense transformation, and more about creating the conditions for the body to slowly return to its natural rhythm.
description5: Through 1:1 guidance, herbal support, nutritional journeys, embodiment practices, and education, I support people in reconnecting with the wisdom of their own bodies and cultivating a more balanced way of living.

name: skill
title: In a short time, I have been able to achieve excellence in all areas of development.
description: I provide cost-effective and high quality products to meet our Clients’ needs of timely We provide cost-effective and high quality products to meet our Clients’ needs of timely.

name: portfolio
title: Main Offerings
description: Grounded pathways into nervous system restoration, herbal wellbeing, and embodied living.

name: skillTwo
title: My Skills in Years
description: When the past gets its teeth into our daily life, it may get to grips with an astringent reality and adjust our timeline. By recognizing ourselves in the light of our history, we become aware of what we are.(c)

name: testimonial
title: Steve Lehman
subtitle: CEO of Hiday Motors.
description: We were looking for a logo with a touch of modernism. Arlo grasped our needs and produced a stunning design. Awesome to work with Arlo. Incredibly organized, easy to communicate with, responsive with next iterations.

title: Book a Conversation
